summary.key_theme: 市場對 AI 顛覆網路安全產業的擔憂逐漸消退，投資人轉而關注 Zscaler 在零信任架構與 Z-Flex 靈活定價模式下的強勁 ARR 成長潛力。

bullish.title: The Great Repricing Crushed This Cybersecurity Growth Stock. That's a Buying Opportunity. — Zscaler looks undervalued after its latest pullback.
bullish.reason: 分析師認為近期股價回調提供了買入機會，強調 Zscaler 在網路安全領域的成長性被市場低估。

bullish.title: Why Zscaler (ZS) Stock Is Trading Up Today — Shares of cloud security platform Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) jumped 4.3% in the afternoon session after sentiment improved
bullish.reason: 市場情緒好轉帶動股價單日上漲 4.3 %，反映出投資人對該公司基本面的信心回升。

bullish.title: Can Zero Trust Everywhere Adoption Boost Zscaler's Long-Term Growth? — ZS' Zero Trust Everywhere adoption is accelerating, with enterprise customers surging and larger deals boosting ARR
bullish.reason: 零信任架構的採用率加速，大型企業客戶增加直接推升了年度經常性收入 (ARR)，顯示長期成長動能強勁。

bullish.title: Will the Rising Adoption of Z-Flex Boost Zscaler's Revenue Growth? — ZS' Z-Flex gains traction with $290M in bookings and rising multi-module deals.
bullish.reason: Z-Flex 模式獲得市場認可，錄得 2.9 億美元訂單，且多模組交易增加，有助於提升營收成長的可持續性。

bearish.title: Zscaler Stock Shows No Signs of Bottoming Amid Claude Mythos-Induced Crash — Zscaler stock sinks on Anthropic’s Claude Mythos leak.
bearish.reason: Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 模型洩漏引發市場對 AI 顛覆傳統網路安全業務的擔憂，導致股價承壓。

bearish.title: CrowdStrike, Zscaler, and SentinelOne Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know — A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the cybersecurity sector sold off
bearish.reason: 整個網路安全板塊因市場對競爭加劇的擔憂而遭到拋售，導致 Zscaler 股價隨同產業下跌。

neutral.title: Prediction: This Cybersecurity Stock Will Double After the AI Disruption Fears Fade
neutral.reason: 該文屬於觀點評論，指出股價下跌主因是 AI 恐慌，雖對未來持樂觀態度，但未提供具體財務數據支撐，故列為中性觀察。
